text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: More, more, more!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Haaaaa!

We're halfway through summer camp, and
everyone is busy honing their minds and bodies
for the next race...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

Mihono Bourbon is also training hard to surpass
the 3,000-meter benchmark for the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...
choice_data_list: Want to take a little break?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negative! I have an adequate amount of stamina
remaining.

She had an amazing showing at the Japanese
Derby.

She's been eagerly preparing to tackle the Kikuka
Sho, but lately, she hasn't been feeling her best
for some reason.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Again, my results are worse than yesterday.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have felt unwell for a duration of two days. Yet
my analysis has determined no definite cause.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not detect any problems with the training
flowchart either.

But the sun has already set, and we can't stay on
the beach forever.

I manage to urge the bewildered Mihono Bourbon
to head back to the campsite. She approaches me
again later at night.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer. I would like to discuss something.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I consulted some medical books regarding various
symptoms, such as increases in anxiety,
irritability, and accumulation of fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
After completing my analysis, my current status
has shifted to "unsure."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I procured data from my
previous training that shows similar results.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Before my debut, my 3,000-meter run time was
thrown into great disarray despite all the training
I had done. This is the data from that day.

Mihono Bourbon's previous trainer wanted to
develop her into a sprinter, forcing her to go to
great lengths to try and change his mind.

She attempted to run 3,000 meters, but
inevitably failed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Such a result was natural considering my ability at
the time. I accept that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, as illogical as it may be, a few days
ago, I began feeling the same chilling sensation in
the pit of my stomach that I felt on that day.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Such a thing has never happened to me before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But now, those memories keep repeating
themselves in my head...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The usual calm and collected demeanor that I
have during training that was set by default has
now seemed to vanish.
I've never seen Mihono Bourbon this dispirited.

I decide that she needs a quick change of pace
and spring into action.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: The mountain breeze feels so cool, Trainer.

It might be due to the nearby stream or because
we're in a valley, but it is indeed cool and
refreshing outside.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Lactic acid production is being suppressed by the
influence of negative ions. Thiamine consumption
decreasing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on stability of mental and physical
functions, status updated to "relaxed."
Registering mountain climbing as an effective
method of achieving "a change of pace."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your suggestion, Trainer. This will
be of use in my future training.
choice_data_list: I'm just glad it helped you clear your mind.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You often provide me with a variety of
information not found in my data logs.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For example, I was only able to achieve
consistent lap times for 1,600-meter races with
your advice.

Now that you mention it, something like that did
happen shortly after we first met.

I couldn't just stand by and let her continue
following such a haphazard training method, so I
suggested that she focus on her lap times.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...My emotional status has shifted to "happy."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your advice has been invaluable. I am certain this
brings me one step closer to the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
By placing your faith in me, you were able to
implement great updates to my system.

To be honest, I thought long distances would be
difficult for her at the time.

I only advised her to be conscious of her lap times
because I couldn't stand seeing her push herself
so recklessly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer?
choice_data_list:
I actually wrote you off as a sprinter too back
then, to tell the truth.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Status—"shock."

She was already known as a promising sprinter
back when we first met.

With her naturally powerful physique and
developed fast-twitch muscle fibers, she was
actually far better at sprints.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But this information presents a contradiction.
Why did you scout me, then?
choice_data_list: You made me believe in you.
You made me believe in you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I did?

As I watched her give it everything she had, I
suddenly found myself wanting to believe in her.
choice_data_list: That's why I chose to scout you.
That's why I chose to scout you.

text_block_list.text: Bit by bit, my memories are coming back to me.

The day she finished first in a 2,000-meter race,
the day she made the world realize that she had a
shot at the Classic Triple Crown tour...

Mihono Bourbon turned what seemed to be a wild
fantasy into a lucid reality.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That's only because your instructions were
extremely effective, Trainer.
choice_data_list: No, you did it through your own efforts.
No, you did it through your own efforts.

text_block_list.text:
Her hard work has the power to make anyone a
believer.

I know that, without a doubt, she'll be ready for
the Kikuka Sho.
Mihono Bourbon looks at me in shock.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, you... you believe in me.
We finally reach the mountain's summit.

Mihono Bourbon is enveloped in the light of the
sunset.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Data recovery confirmed. New "awakening" has
occurred.

With that, Mihono Bourbon raises her head and
looks forward with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Until now, I have worked toward the Classic
Triple Crown through sheer "will."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This "will" was acquired when I was a child. It is
powerful and unwavering.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Above all else, I am certain that this powerful
phenomenon inside of me is worthy of your faith.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will move forward with confidence and take on
the Kikuka Sho by using the methods that have
gotten us this far.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In order to run 3,000 meters and emerge
victorious, I believe this is the optimal action to
take.

It could be on account of the setting sun, but her
blue eyes are now shining with a mighty vermilion
hue.
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status updated from "unsure" to "confident." I am
able to perform any type of training today.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Let's do our best, Trainer.

Not wanting to let her enthusiasm go to waste, I
quickly assign her some training tasks.
choice_data_list: Try lifting weights until you're at your limit.

Try running along the beach until you're at your
limit.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Initiating intense weight
lifting.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Accumulation of lactic acid has been detected,
but limits have not been reached.
Bourbon trains her hardest until sunset!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Order acknowledged. Initiating intense running
on the beach.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have discovered that running by the ocean
offers a beautiful view and can be classified as
"enjoyable."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
For reasons unknown, I was unaware of this until
now.
Bourbon trains her hardest until sunset!
